creator: glebius@FreeBSD.org
text:
This conditional assignment had made several people to scratch their heads,
but eventually every one agreed that it is safe.  I'd be interested to see
the 3 thread race that actually makes this code fail.  The more you think
on this race, the more you would think that the code that does it is not
correct.  By definition, if your *m->m_ext.ext_cnt is 1, then you OWN this
mbuf, and nobody else should see it.  So how does two other find it?

Given that bug report is quite old, I'd prefer not to change any code unless
submitter comes back and gives more information.

btw, thanks for bring it up, Zhenlei.  I totally missed it, and didn't know
about its existence.
